question: Please put your first American homes in order. Where did you live first, when did you live in the small one-bedroom near Royal Oak, and when did you move to the larger house?
answer: First apartment was in buffalo New York then we moved to Michigan. We had an apartment in Southfield. We moved to townhouse in Royal Oak and from there we went to Tr0y. We bought a house there three bedroom. I had my three boys born in Tr0y.
